data.description: MORGAN STANLEY CUTS COSTCO PRICE TARGET TO $1130 FROM $1225
Bank of Italy Keeps Bank Capital Requirement at Zero for the Fourth Quarter

data.title: NEXTCHEM and Siemens Energy join forces for high temp methanol fuel cell for maritime industry. Milan, 9/26/25 - PRNewswire.
data.description: NextChem has been selected to supply the fuel cell modules, with Siemens Energy in charge of the onboard system integration and energy management system. The partnership between the two companies was solidified with the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding. The agreement, announced in Milan on September 26, 2025, by MAIRE, will see NextChem providing the fuel cell modules, while Siemens Energy will focus on the onboard system integration and energy management system. This collaboration is expected to greatly benefit the industry and represents significant progress in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Softheon earns spot on TIME's Top HealthTech Companies of 2025. Provides enrollment & billing services.
data.description: A prominent healthcare technology company based in Stony Brook, New York, has reported offering enrollment, billing, and member management services to health plans and government agencies. Softheon, a top player in cloud-based healthcare technology, revealed on September 26, 2025, that it has earned a spot on TIME's list.

data.title: Chef Kwame Onwuachi opens Patty Palace in Time Out Market NYC offering BOGO patties. Celebrating debut with bold flavors.
data.description: Renowned chef and James Beard Award winner, Kwame Onwuachi, is marking the grand opening with a special offer of Buy One Get One (BOGO) patties in New York City. The exciting launch of Patty Palace by Chef Kwame is set to infuse the city with unique flavors and lively ambiance. This event is scheduled to take place on September 26, 2025.

data.title: Insperity HR360 delivers positive 3-year ROI and qualitative benefits, says study by Forrester Consulting. NYSE: NSP.
data.description: Houston-based company Insperity, Inc. (NYSE: NSP) revealed findings from a study conducted by Forrester Consulting on the Total Economic Impact™ of their HR360 Solution. The solution aims to alleviate administrative HR tasks and provide access to HR specialists, allowing leaders to concentrate on strategic objectives and company advancement. According to the Forrester study, organizations utilizing Insperity HR360 can experience significant benefits, including cost savings and improved efficiency.

data.title: Databook launches Guided Selling Platform 2.0 in Palo Alto, enabling enterprises to optimize GTM execution and revenue growth.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Databook 2.0 has been launched, offering enterprises the ability to establish, expand, and maintain strategic connections focused on business results and value. This new platform aims to assist in building and maintaining relationships that drive success in the business world.

data.title: Cities urged to prepare for climate change during New York Climate Week. Initiative to provide risk profiles for popular destinations to build resilient visitor economies. #NewYorkClimateWeek #TravelFoundation.
data.description: A recent effort launched in New York during Climate Week 2025 aims to equip well-known global cities with detailed climate risk assessments tailored for the travel and tourism sector. This initiative will offer strategic guidance on enhancing the resilience of visitor economies. The Travel Foundation and a group of partners announced this development, emphasizing the importance of preparing popular destinations for future challenges. The goal is to support cities in mitigating risks and ensuring sustainable tourism practices.

data.title: P&G to webcast Q1 results discussion on October 24, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Visit www.pginvestor.com for live webcast.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) will hold a webcast to discuss its first quarter earnings starting at 8:30 a.m. ET. Interested media and investors can tune in to the live audio webcast on www.pginvestor.com. The webcast will be accessible for replay post the event. Procter & Gamble (P&G) is a global consumer goods company offering a wide array of top-quality brands like Always®, Ambi Pur®, Ariel® to consumers worldwide.

data.title: Lubrizol launches HybriCal™, a lithium-free grease thickener tech based on anhydrous calcium, meeting HPM Grease standards.
data.description: In Cleveland, Lubrizol has introduced the HybriCal™ lithium-free grease thickener formulation for industrial applications, aiming to fulfill modern performance requirements. Based on anhydrous calcium, this formulation serves as a lithium hydroxide alternative, addressing the needs of grease producers and users. It complies with the High-Performance Multiuse (HPM) Grease Specification set by the National Lubricating Grease Institute (NLGI), representing an innovative solution in the sector.
Bonduelle reports successful 2024-2025 Annual results, hitting transformation targets and starting recovery plan.

data.title: Aebi Schmidt Group, a specialty vehicles leader listed on Nasdaq (AEBI), pays its first dividend.
data.description: A global leader in specialty vehicles, Aebi Schmidt Group (NASDAQ: AEBI) has confirmed its first dividend payout in Frauenfeld, Switzerland on September 26, 2025.

data.title: Leo Cancer Care and Sumitomo Heavy Industries partner for Proton Therapy; new configuration to revolutionize cancer care.
data.description: Middleton, Wisconsin - On September 26, 2025, Leo Cancer Care, a prominent provider of advanced cancer treatments, partnered with Sumitomo Heavy Industries, a leading developer of medical technology worldwide, to launch a revolutionary Proton Therapy setup. The collaboration marks a significant advancement in cancer care solutions and highlights the ongoing commitment to enhance medical technologies for improved patient outcomes.

data.title: RIMAN receives 20-year USDA protection for Giant BYoungPool™, revolutionizing K-beauty.oweringCentella asiatica variety.
data.description: In a press release dated September 26, 2025, from Seoul, South Korea, RIMAN, a prominent figure in K-beauty and Direct Sales, revealed a significant development in the beauty industry. The company disclosed that its exclusive Centella asiatica strain, known as Giant BYoungPool™, secured a 20-year approval. This innovation showcases the fusion of K-beauty heritage with cutting-edge skincare advancements, further solidifying RIMAN's position as a pioneer in the beauty sector.

data.title: White Cap opens first Enterprise Distribution Center in Perris, California. Leading distributor of construction supplies.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Atlanta, White Cap, a top distributor of specialized construction supplies and safety products for professional contractors, marked the inauguration of its initial Enterprise Distribution Center (EDC) in Perris, California. This significant milestone signifies White Cap's commitment to expanding its operations and presence in the industry.

data.title: Bodily injury costs rise in Nevada, prompting Mercury Insurance to offer new umbrella policy to protect personal wealth.
data.description: Mercury Insurance has introduced a new umbrella insurance policy aimed at providing enhanced protection for the personal wealth of Nevada residents against bodily injury claims. This initiative comes amidst rising occurrences of multi-vehicle accidents, dog attacks, and injuries to individuals such as delivery personnel on private properties. Through this new policy, Mercury aims to offer additional coverage and financial security to individuals facing unforeseen events resulting in bodily harm.

data.title: Survey: 48% of crypto investors prioritize Bitcoin in portfolios post-Halving. Learn how traders strategize.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by CoinGecko shows that nearly half, or 48%, of cryptocurrency investors give priority to Bitcoin in their investment portfolios, especially following the recent Halving event. The survey delves into the diverse strategies being adopted by traders and investors as they position themselves in the market.
